top3.sql:
SELECT buildUpPlaySpeedClass 
FROM Team_Attributes 
WHERE team_api_id = (SELECT team_api_id FROM Team WHERE team_long_name = 'Willem II') 
AND date = '2011-02-22';

SELECT buildUpPlaySpeedClass
FROM Team_Attributes
JOIN Team ON Team_Attributes.team_api_id = Team.team_api_id
WHERE Team.team_long_name = 'Willem II'
  AND Team_Attributes.date = '2011-02-22';

SELECT buildUpPlaySpeedClass 
FROM Team_Attributes 
WHERE team_api_id = (SELECT team_api_id FROM Team WHERE team_long_name = 'Willem II') 
AND date = '2011-02-22';

SELECT buildUpPlaySpeedClass
FROM Team_Attributes
JOIN Team ON Team_Attributes.team_api_id = Team.team_api_id
WHERE Team.team_long_name = 'Willem II'
  AND Team_Attributes.date = '2011-02-22';

FROM Team_Attributes 
WHERE team_api_id = (SELECT team_api_id FROM Team WHERE team_long_name = 'Willem II') 
AND date = '2011-02-22';

SELECT buildUpPlaySpeedClass

JOIN Team ON Team_Attributes.team_api_id = Team.team_api_id

  AND Team_Attributes.date = '2011-02-22';

SELECT buildUpPlaySpeedClass 
FROM Team_Attributes 
WHERE team_fifa_api_id = (SELECT team_fifa_api_id FROM Team WHERE team_long_name = 'Willem II') 
AND date = '2011-02-22';
